summary: Completed testing of Homepage Image Management features for Shop Categories and Shop by Styles sections. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend admin panel shows both sections with image edit functionality. Customer homepage displays unique images for each category.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage image management features fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/filters/homepage-styles/all, PATCH /api/filters/homepage-styles/update-value, PUT /api/website-admin/categories/{id}, POST /api/website-admin/upload-image all working. Frontend admin panel at /admin/homepage-manager has Shop Categories and Shop by Styles sections with image edit overlays (Upload File + Paste URL). Customer homepage at /shop shows unique images for each category.

backend: PUT /api/website-admin/categories/{id} - update image_url for category works
frontend: Homepage Manager sidebar shows 'Shop Categories' and 'Shop by Styles' navigation items
Shop Categories section shows 8 category cards with green checkmarks for homepage display
Clicking image edit button shows overlay with 'Upload File' and 'Paste URL' options
Shop by Styles section loads and displays 271 available styles from API
Style cards have image edit overlay with upload and URL paste functionality
Customer homepage categories show 8 unique images (not identical)
